module: Module 12 — AP Exam Synthesis and Free-Response Strategy

individual_verdicts.B_adversarial_top_student: minor (3 flags, all nuance, all optional)

rationale: No critical issues. All three reviewers explicitly recommend SHIP. Reviewer A's two minor flags are both 'no change required, current phrasing acceptable.' Reviewer B's three flags are nuance for top-percentile students that would not improve the lesson for the broad target audience. Reviewer C verifies every numerical and structural claim against the CED. Skipping round 2 — no actionable revisions queued.
carry_to_script: Maintain the exact exam-structure numbers from section 04 verbatim (45 / 105 / 50%; 30+60 no-calc / 15+45 calc; 6 / 90 / 50%; 2+30 calc / 4+60 no-calc).
Keep the BECAUSE-compare slide as the climactic teaching moment.
Keep coach-before-the-game tone in the path slide ('go earn the five' — aspirational by design).
